title: Nilakantheswar Temple
tagline: Nilakantheswar Temple — spiritual town of Odisha

overview.short: Nilakantheswar Temple at Padmapur, standing on the Jagamanda hills makes the village well known for the Buddhist temple.
overview.description: Nilakantheswar Temple at Padmapur, standing on the Jagamanda hills makes the village well known for the Buddhist temple. The temple is built on only seven rocks. There are also three other shiva temples, i.e. Pudukeswar, Dhabaleswar, and Mallikeswar, on the hillock.

topPlaces.name: Padmapur, Rayagada
topPlaces.description: Padmapur is a village in the Rayagada district of Odisha, India. It is the most populated village and one of the identified tourist centers of Rayagada district.

topPlaces.name: Godiabandha
topPlaces.description: Godiabandha is a small village located in the Indian state of Odisha in the Rayagada district. Aga Soura of Godiabandha was one of the tribal activists who supported the bhoodan movement in Koraput district by forming bhoo samaj.

topPlaces.name: Gunupur Airstrip
topPlaces.description: Gunupur Airstrip is a public airstrip owned by Government of Odisha located at Gunupur in the Rayagada district of Odisha. Nearest airport to this airstrip is Jeypore Airport in Jeypore, Odisha.

items.note: Padmapur is a village in the Rayagada district of Odisha, India. It is the most populated village and one of the identified tourist centers of Rayagada district.

Godiabandha is a small village located in the Indian state of Odisha in the Rayagada district. Aga Soura of Godiabandha was one of the tribal activists who supported the bhoodan movement in Koraput district by forming bhoo samaj.
Gunupur Airstrip is a public airstrip owned by Government of Odisha located at Gunupur in the Rayagada district of Odisha. Nearest airport to this airstrip is Jeypore Airport in Jeypore, Odisha.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Nilakantheswar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Nilakantheswar Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Nilakantheswar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Visakhapatnam Airport (180 km) and the nearest railway station is Visakhapatnam Junction (177 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Nilakantheswar Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Nilakantheswar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Nilakantheswar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Nilakantheswar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Nilakantheswar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Padmapur, Rayagada, Godiabandha, Gunupur Airstrip.
